programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: In Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: Kentucky loses his horse in a rigged horse race and gets framed for the murder of a stagecoach driver

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A scientist whos working on establishing contact with alien life finds his project in jeopardy when his loan shark comes to call Meanwhile another scientist is researching the communicative skills of an intelligent chimp but her arrogant boss seems to have more of an interest in torturing the animal than performing legitimate experiments

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A cop learns that an illustrator of Tales from the Crypt might have the power to make his monstrous creations come to life due to his shrewish wife

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Enoch the two-faced man an attraction at a sideshow falls in love with a 4000 year old mummy eventually leading up to the conception of their bastard child The Crypt Keeper

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A photographer decides not to stop a woman from committing suicide in order to get some good pictures of the tragedy His new female assistant makes him face his lack of empathy

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A nurse wants the husband of her patient for herself so she delves into black magic to get rid of her patient However her plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Knight 317
programme.desc: Knight 317

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan Micki and Jack track down an antique pocket watch that allows its owner to freeze time

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Mchale 411
programme.desc: Mchale 411

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth the whole truth and nothing but the truth

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When Gomers cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomers uniforms and then wanders the base everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways start disappearing one by one and when the remaining castaways discover that headhunters have not taken them Gilligan begins to think hes a Dr Jeckyll and Mr Hyde and has killed them all

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An unattractive and lovelorn woman named Eva Grubb comes to the island to escape civilization and offers the castaways her boat But before they can leave the women give her a makeover and turn her into a Ginger Grant lookalike

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Much to Grampas consternation George wants to join a private club known as the Loyal Order of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampas vanity gets the best of him when he refuses to acknowledge that he needs eyeglasses to pass the vision test for his new California drivers license

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL couriers are disappearing on airliners Max is assigned as the next courier and has to solve the mystery or die

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 portray look alike ex-cons Connie and Floyd Bonnie and Clyde! to find out where their mentor hid all his stolen loot

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ becomes involved in the dizzy antics of a couple of inexperienced female detectives Lorrie Mahaffey and Rebecca Reynolds tracking a low-down Lothario who romances elderly women to steal their fortunes

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur promises a magician that he will take care of his elephant for a few days and Eds not too thrilled with the idea Meanwhile Kay brings home one wrong dog too many so Roger moves into a motel

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Roger buy the contract of a professional heavyweight wrestler

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany so he creates a health spa

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: All goes well when Hogans gang steals Klinks code book from his safe photographs the contents and returns it to its proper place But theres a small hitch - Carter forgets to load the camera with film

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes efforts to reform old-time moonshiner Hard Luck Jones runs into plenty of roadblocks when he hijacks a tank to use as a rolling brewery Bo and Luke have to convince Jones to stop his illegal activities before they wind up in federal prison

programme.title: Hercules 208
programme.desc: Hercules 208

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Dr Larry Clark is a bio engineer who works on the skrills When the companions decide to get rid of a series one of them joins with Clark

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens suffer from radiation poisoning and develop suits to protect themselves Meanwhile the government attempts to shut down Harrison and his team believing that the alien menace is no more

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two of Tressas friends are trapped in an invisible stealth shield developed by Dr Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A distortion in time produces two separate moons with two separate Alphas from different eras

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne and his co-worker Smitty worried about smoke signals decide to hide on a high area but find an outlaw gang already there When the Shoshone attack a stage the group rescues the driver and woman passenger but are now trapped

programme.desc: Domestic dissension helps the police in their pursuit of a family of con artists; guests Michael Ansara Philip Ahn

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rollins sent to investigate the case of a beautiful Latin American spy whos suddenly started acting suspiciously the IM force must find out if shes still on the right side - or if shes losing her sanity

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 43 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating matchup of Keegan ""The Condition"" Oliver vs. pro debut Derek ""Manchild"" Falk. This is followed by the entertaining contest of Aaron ""Vanilla Gorilla"" Gallant vs. Mike O'Neil, and the first Welterweight Title Defense for Sergej ""El Dorado"" Juskevic as he takes on challenger Lorawnt-T Nelson.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brains Caribbean holiday is interrupted by a gang of MAD pirates

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The root which only responds to Audric or something belonging to him reacts to the Planet Xiang which leads Jayce and Herc there even though it is a planet controlled by Saw Boss They discover a message from Audric on a vase but before they can get it it is stolen Jayce and Herc and Oon are drawn further into the city where Saw Boss has laid a trap for Jayce Jayce and Oon fall into a pit which is slowly being consumed by fire; but Herc Gillian and Flora come to the rescue Safely aboard the Pride they decode the message which is revealed to be too old to be of much use

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian tells the story of Valroth a powerful weapons maker who made living armor to protect his people many years ago But the armor became too powerful and it was all destroyed except for the helmet Jayce seeks the helmet finds it and after putting it on his power is invincible He easily defeats some monster minds But the helmet is wicked and it takes over Jayces body Jayce and the power of light conquer the evil helmet and then they destroy it

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM kidnaps panda bears from China and transports them Easter Island Its up to MASK figure out how to rescue the bears who have been put in harms way

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM terrorizes Tokyo Japan using a new vehicle called Blackout which is capable of draining electrical power supplies

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger
